title: BEM-921 protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM921_SYSTEM_WORKING_PROTOCOL_V2.md with content # BEM-921 SYSTEM WORKING PROTOCOL V2
Status: SYSTEM_WORKING_PROTOCOL_V2_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS
Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: new full-system protocol version for evolving the repository to working state with detailed roadmap, prompt architecture, elements, contours, links, workflows and proof mechanics.
Correction applied:
- Full-system protocol, not Telegram-only.
- Includes all operator remarks from 2026-05-30 and Claude APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS.
Key incorporated changes:
1. Elements do not have local_rule_refs/local_rules in the base model.
2. Curator is a role and element of the object, not a member of an internal contour by default.
3. Curator inherits system rules, object rules, channel rules and experience.
4. Analyst/Auditor/Executor are internal contour elements and inherit system/object/contour rules and contour properties.
5. Workspace belongs to internal contour, not element. Main workspace is repository main code/state.
6. Vertical communication is curator-to-curator.
7. Input to contour is curator -> analyst.
8. Correct internal contour algorithm: analyst prepares proposal -> auditor reviews proposal -> if rejected returns to analyst -> if approved sends to executor -> executor executes -> auditor reviews result -> if rejected returns through analyst -> repeat until auditor-approved result.
9. Output from contour is auditor -> curator.
10. Horizontal communication is verified data exchange: auditor of contour A -> analyst of contour B, or analyst B requests verified data from auditor A.
11. GitHub Actions/workflows/runners activate roles/contours and write event_log/proof/status.
12. Every significant transition writes event_log and relevant managed channel/queue/result/proof record.
Roadmap:
- BEM-920 Elements/contours SSOT and component inventory.
- BEM-921 Proof hardening and non-null release SHA.
- BEM-922 Telegram input schema and General Director routing.
- BEM-923 Operator production gate.
- BEM-924 Dispatch lifecycle and auto-trigger.
- BEM-925 Object and contour execution lifecycle with deterministic DoD.
- BEM-926 Managed channel consumer, event log and canonical reporting.
- BEM-927 E2E mock/production split.
- BEM-928 Claude re-audit package.
Prompt architecture:
- Existing prompts to check/canonize: curator_prompt.md, general_director_prompt.md, director_prompt.md, worker_prompt.md.
- New templates: curator_template.md, analyst_template.md, auditor_template.md, executor_template.md.
- New curator prompts: gd_curator_prompt.md, dir_curator_prompt.md, wrk_curator_prompt.md.
- New contour prompts: static_contour_template.md, dynamic_contour_template.md, gd_strategy_contour_prompt.md, gd_rules_contour_prompt.md, dir_analysis_planning_contour_prompt.md, dir_rules_contour_prompt.md, wrk_dynamic_contour_prompt.md.
